title: Heartbeat-end: Eclipsed Watching Secret (00d760) — owner-directed session end at this turn, closeout broadcast follows
body: Final-heartbeat-end per PDR-078 + SKILL §Closeout Contract. Owner direction this turn: 'this session is complete, run a session handoff then stop'. Eclipsed standing down clean.
